creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
The geogebra uses linux-binary java so this use /usr/local/share/geogebra/jre1.7.0_45-i686/lib/i386/jli/libjli.so which is linux-binary. I don't have openjdk* (FreeBSD's package) and works (for me) geogebra well.

Can you check what commands will run? ("set -x" at the beginning of /usr/local/share/geogebra/geogebra-portable and /usr/local/share/geogebra/geogebra/geogebra)
